title: thalictrum flavum subsp. costae
intro: Thalictrum flavum subsp. costae, also known as meadow rue, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of meadow rue include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and bronchitis. Meadow rue can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
